## Meeting Purpose

[Align on Surge AI's marketing strategy and execution framework for the coming months.](https://fathom.video/share/2bVpSiLDV1AXvs_2pfy4Cnzfc4RhBAec?tab=summary&timestamp=61.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Surge AI aims to establish a more proactive, independent marketing approach with a committed overall framework](https://fathom.video/share/2bVpSiLDV1AXvs_2pfy4Cnzfc4RhBAec?tab=summary&timestamp=108.0)
  - [Focus on five pillars: identity, content, experience, distribution, and conversion](https://fathom.video/share/2bVpSiLDV1AXvs_2pfy4Cnzfc4RhBAec?tab=summary&timestamp=452.0)
  - [Immediate priorities include brand standardization, blog launch, website updates, and aggressive pursuit of podcast/media appearances](https://fathom.video/share/2bVpSiLDV1AXvs_2pfy4Cnzfc4RhBAec?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Potential collaborations with Apple and other companies on AI benchmarks to build authority and relationships](https://fathom.video/share/2bVpSiLDV1AXvs_2pfy4Cnzfc4RhBAec?tab=summary&timestamp=912.0)

## Topics

### Marketing Strategy Alignment

  - [Surge AI seeks to operate more independently on marketing efforts](https://fathom.video/share/2bVpSiLDV1AXvs_2pfy4Cnzfc4RhBAec?tab=summary&timestamp=108.0)
  - [Need for predictability due to dedicated resources for Surge AI-specific initiatives](https://fathom.video/share/2bVpSiLDV1AXvs_2pfy4Cnzfc4RhBAec?tab=summary&timestamp=378.0)
  - [Agreement on an overall framework for events and activities over the next few months](https://fathom.video/share/2bVpSiLDV1AXvs_2pfy4Cnzfc4RhBAec?tab=summary&timestamp=452.0)
  - [70-30 or 80-20 split between planned and reactive efforts](https://fathom.video/share/2bVpSiLDV1AXvs_2pfy4Cnzfc4RhBAec?tab=summary&timestamp=642.0)

### Five Pillars of Marketing Approach

  - [Identity: Establishing a strong foundation for brand perception](https://fathom.video/share/2bVpSiLDV1AXvs_2pfy4Cnzfc4RhBAec?tab=summary&timestamp=457.0)
  - [Content: Demonstrating expertise through regular content creation](https://fathom.video/share/2bVpSiLDV1AXvs_2pfy4Cnzfc4RhBAec?tab=summary&timestamp=479.0)
  - [Experience: Systematically creating positive brand interactions](https://fathom.video/share/2bVpSiLDV1AXvs_2pfy4Cnzfc4RhBAec?tab=summary&timestamp=516.0)
  - [Distribution: Building consistent presence and authority over time](https://fathom.video/share/2bVpSiLDV1AXvs_2pfy4Cnzfc4RhBAec?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Conversion: Ensuring efforts contribute to desired outcomes (meaningful conversations, perception)](https://fathom.video/share/2bVpSiLDV1AXvs_2pfy4Cnzfc4RhBAec?tab=summary&timestamp=588.0)

### Immediate Execution Priorities (Aug-Oct)

  - [Standardize brand visuals and messaging](https://fathom.video/share/2bVpSiLDV1AXvs_2pfy4Cnzfc4RhBAec?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Launch blog and begin publishing content](https://fathom.video/share/2bVpSiLDV1AXvs_2pfy4Cnzfc4RhBAec?tab=summary&timestamp=670.0)
  - [Create MVP website with video](https://fathom.video/share/2bVpSiLDV1AXvs_2pfy4Cnzfc4RhBAec?tab=summary&timestamp=680.0)
  - [Aggressive pursuit of podcast appearances and media opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/2bVpSiLDV1AXvs_2pfy4Cnzfc4RhBAec?tab=summary&timestamp=748.0)
  - [Finalize sales collateral](https://fathom.video/share/2bVpSiLDV1AXvs_2pfy4Cnzfc4RhBAec?tab=summary&timestamp=696.0)
  - [Activate content amplification strategies](https://fathom.video/share/2bVpSiLDV1AXvs_2pfy4Cnzfc4RhBAec?tab=summary&timestamp=756.0)
  - [Prepare for events, workshops, and benchmark releases](https://fathom.video/share/2bVpSiLDV1AXvs_2pfy4Cnzfc4RhBAec?tab=summary&timestamp=758.0)

### Collaborations and Benchmarks

  - [Potential collaboration with Apple on an AI benchmark (possibly in September)](https://fathom.video/share/2bVpSiLDV1AXvs_2pfy4Cnzfc4RhBAec?tab=summary&timestamp=912.0)
  - [Discussion about collaborating with smaller companies (e.g., Hayes Labs) on safety benchmarks](https://fathom.video/share/2bVpSiLDV1AXvs_2pfy4Cnzfc4RhBAec?tab=summary&timestamp=912.0)
  - [Emphasis on showing work externally to build goodwill and relationships in the AI community](https://fathom.video/share/2bVpSiLDV1AXvs_2pfy4Cnzfc4RhBAec?tab=summary&timestamp=1031.0)

### Content and Distribution Strategies

  - [Newsletter consideration for building subscriber base and consistent communication](https://fathom.video/share/2bVpSiLDV1AXvs_2pfy4Cnzfc4RhBAec?tab=summary&timestamp=808.0)
  - [Video content series similar to Sunna Labs to associate with respected AI leaders](https://fathom.video/share/2bVpSiLDV1AXvs_2pfy4Cnzfc4RhBAec?tab=summary&timestamp=1194.0)
  - [Exec dinners and meetups to build community and ecosystem around Surge AI](https://fathom.video/share/2bVpSiLDV1AXvs_2pfy4Cnzfc4RhBAec?tab=summary&timestamp=1311.0)

### Staffing and Resource Allocation

  - [Core team: Marcel, Jason (VP of Growth), Ren, and George (Chief of Staff)](https://fathom.video/share/2bVpSiLDV1AXvs_2pfy4Cnzfc4RhBAec?tab=summary&timestamp=1430.0)
  - [Consideration of adding a PhD-level ML researcher for technical content review (if needed)](https://fathom.video/share/2bVpSiLDV1AXvs_2pfy4Cnzfc4RhBAec?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)

### Budget and Costs

  - [Rough estimates provided for various marketing activities](https://fathom.video/share/2bVpSiLDV1AXvs_2pfy4Cnzfc4RhBAec?tab=summary&timestamp=1489.0)
  - [Emphasis on paid amplification and high-quality collaborations](https://fathom.video/share/2bVpSiLDV1AXvs_2pfy4Cnzfc4RhBAec?tab=summary&timestamp=1556.0)
  - [Conferences to be determined in the coming months](https://fathom.video/share/2bVpSiLDV1AXvs_2pfy4Cnzfc4RhBAec?tab=summary&timestamp=1545.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Review and provide feedback on the latest version of the Surge AI video](https://fathom.video/share/2bVpSiLDV1AXvs_2pfy4Cnzfc4RhBAec?tab=summary&timestamp=1760.0)
  - [Decide on collaboration approach for benchmarks (Apple, Hayes Labs)](https://fathom.video/share/2bVpSiLDV1AXvs_2pfy4Cnzfc4RhBAec?tab=summary&timestamp=912.0)
  - [Finalize immediate execution priorities for August-October](https://fathom.video/share/2bVpSiLDV1AXvs_2pfy4Cnzfc4RhBAec?tab=summary&timestamp=628.0)
  - [Determine necessity of technical editor for content accuracy](https://fathom.video/share/2bVpSiLDV1AXvs_2pfy4Cnzfc4RhBAec?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Follow up on video discussion and next steps asynchronously](https://fathom.video/share/2bVpSiLDV1AXvs_2pfy4Cnzfc4RhBAec?tab=summary&timestamp=1826.0)
